Call Center Performance Report 2025
Excel · Power Query · Pivot Tables · Dashboard Design

Built an interactive Excel dashboard analyzing 1,000 call center interactions across 5 representatives (R01–R05) in 3 Ohio cities — Cincinnati, Cleveland, and Columbus. The dashboard tracks call volume trends, revenue by representative, male vs. female caller ratios, and customer satisfaction ratings (avg. 3.9★). Key insights include R03 leading in revenue ($20.9K), peak call volume in March and October, and Wednesday being the busiest day of the week.

Excel (Advanced) Pivot Tables Power Query Dashboard Design Data Visualization KPI Tracking

Hospital Readmission Analysis & Performance Optimization
⭐ Capstone · Franklin University MS Business Analytics · 2025 · 7 Slides

Analyzed 18,330+ CMS records across 2,995 hospitals in 51 states to identify drivers of 30-day hospital readmissions. Performed data cleaning, EDA, and statistical benchmarking across 6 conditions (AMI, HF, Pneumonia, COPD, Hip/Knee, CABG). Key findings: 60% readmission rate highlights critical discharge planning gaps; AMI and HF show highest excess ratios; a small cohort of hospitals exceed the 1.2–1.3 risk threshold. Project objective: implement evidence-based strategies to reduce readmissions and improve patient outcomes.

Python R Healthcare Analytics EDA Statistical Modeling CMS Data Benchmarking
